name: finxan-ai-platform
description: FinxanAI - AI-powered educational platform with Haru character

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend

author: FinxanAI Team
